title: Cars Differences
description: In this game Cars Differences you need to keep locate differences between the two pictures in the limited amount of time given to play each time! To play, use your mouse as control. Make sure that you don’t make a mistake more than three times because that will make you fail. One minute is the total time you will play through the 20 levels in this game! In each level you have seven differences. Good luck!
instructions: Use your mouse or tap the screen to find the differences
